description_long: This object is a modern smartphone with a sleek, rectangular form factor and rounded corners. The front features a large, edge-to-edge touchscreen display with minimal bezels, showing a typical Android home screen with app icons, a search bar, and a weather widget. The device has a matte black exterior with subtle blue accents on the side buttons, which are positioned along the right edge. The back and sides appear to be constructed from a combination of glass and plastic, giving it a smooth yet sturdy feel. No visible branding or camera modules are present on the visible surfaces. The overall design is minimalist and contemporary, suitable for everyday urban use.
description: A sleek, modern smartphone with a large touchscreen display, matte black body, and blue side buttons. The design is minimalist with no visible branding or cameras.
description_view_0: The front view displays the large touchscreen with app icons, search bar, and weather widget, emphasizing the edge-to-edge display and minimal bezels.
description_view_1: The right-side view highlights the blue physical buttons along the edge, contrasting with the matte black body.
description_view_2: The rear view shows a plain matte black surface with no visible branding or camera modules.
description_view_3: The left-side view reveals a smooth, uninterrupted matte black edge with no visible buttons or features.
attribute_screen_display_content: The screen displays an Android home screen with a blue and white abstract wallpaper, several app icons, a Google search bar, a weather widget showing the date and temperature, and a notification bar at the top.
attribute_camera_placement: none visible on any side; no camera modules or lenses are apparent.
attribute_button_layout: Three physical buttons are visible on the right edge: two smaller buttons likely for volume control and one larger button, probably the power button. All are rectangular with a blue color.
